Interface IVersionedObject

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that manage a versioned object.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4A1FB361-B863-11D1-9CE7-0000F8780619")]
public interface IVersionedObject

Properties

HasUncompressedEdits

Indicates if the object has edits that haven't been compressed yet.

bool HasUncompressedEdits { get; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

IsRegisteredAsVersioned

Indicates if the object is registered as versioned.

bool IsRegisteredAsVersioned { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Version

The object's current version.

IVersion Version { get; }

Property Value

IVersion

Methods

GetVersionRegistrationInfo(out bool, out bool)

Indicates if this object is registered as versioned and is moving edits to base.

void GetVersionRegistrationInfo(out bool isRegistered, out bool isMovingEditsToBase)

Parameters

isRegistered bool
isMovingEditsToBase bool

Sample Snippet

RegisterAsVersioned(bool)

Register/UnRegister the object as being versioned.

void RegisterAsVersioned(bool isVersioned)

Parameters

isVersioned bool

Sample Snippet

RegisterAsVersioned3(bool)

Register this object as versioned with the option to move edits to base.

void RegisterAsVersioned3(bool moveEditsToBase)

Parameters

moveEditsToBase bool

Sample Snippet

SupportsMovingEditsToBase()

Indicates if this object supports moving edits to base as a RegisterAsVersioned3 option.

bool SupportsMovingEditsToBase()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

UnRegisterAsVersioned3(bool)

UnRegister this object as versioned with the option to compress the Default edits to base.
